QuestionText: An organization has a new regulatory requirement to implement corrective controls on a financial system. Which of the following is the most likely reason for the new requirement?
AnswerText: To allow for business insurance to be purchased

QuestionText: An organization has a new regulatory requirement to implement corrective controls on a financial system. Which of the following is the most likely reason for the new requirement?
AnswerText: To prevent unauthorized changes to financial data

QuestionText: Which of the following describes the difference between encryption and hashing?
AnswerText: Encryption protects data in transit, while hashing protects data at rest.

QuestionText: Which of the following describes the difference between encryption and hashing?
AnswerText: Encryption replaces cleartext with ciphertext, while hashing calculates a checksum.

QuestionText: Which of the following describes the difference between encryption and hashing?
AnswerText: Encryption ensures data integrity, while hashing ensures data confidentiality.

QuestionText: Which of the following describes the difference between encryption and hashing?
AnswerText: Encryption uses a public-key exchange, while hashing uses a private key.

QuestionText: A security report shows that during a two-week test period, 80% of employees unwittingly disclosed their SSO credentials when accessing an external website. The organization purposely created the website to simulate a cost-free password complexity test. Which of the following would best help reduce the number of visits to similar websites in the future?
AnswerText: Block all outbound traffic from the intranet.

QuestionText: A security report shows that during a two-week test period, 80% of employees unwittingly disclosed their SSO credentials when accessing an external website. The organization purposely created the website to simulate a cost-free password complexity test. Which of the following would best help reduce the number of visits to similar websites in the future?
AnswerText: Introduce a campaign to recognize phishing attempts.

QuestionText: A security report shows that during a two-week test period, 80% of employees unwittingly disclosed their SSO credentials when accessing an external website. The organization purposely created the website to simulate a cost-free password complexity test. Which of the following would best help reduce the number of visits to similar websites in the future?
AnswerText: Restrict internet access for the employees who disclosed credentials.

QuestionText: A security report shows that during a two-week test period, 80% of employees unwittingly disclosed their SSO credentials when accessing an external website. The organization purposely created the website to simulate a cost-free password complexity test. Which of the following would best help reduce the number of visits to similar websites in the future?
AnswerText: Implement a deny list of websites.
